purpose: Shared smoke scenarios for dependency-free framework/function adapter base contracts equivalent to Python adapters.py and MethodFrameworkAdapter facades.
non_goals: The fixture does not require importing real LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, LlamaIndex, or Semantic Kernel packages.
The fixture validates dependency-free adapter boundary semantics; package-specific adapters can layer on top.
